content.welcomeMessage: Hi, I'm Narayan's AI assistant! 👋 I'm here to help you learn more about his background, skills, or projects. What would you like to know?
suggestions: Tell me about your leadership role.

qa.answer: Narayan holds a **B.Tech in Computer Science Engineering** from Nalanda Institute of Technology, Bhubaneswar (2022). He graduated with an impressive 80% score.

As a **UI Team Lead**, Narayan manages a team of 3 developers. After consistently delivering high-quality work on time, he was given the chance to lead multiple projects, maintaining a high success rate and excellent stakeholder feedback.

Narayan has over 2 years of experience in frontend development. He is currently a UI Team Lead at Pixentia Solutions, where he leads a team of 3 developers and defines UI architecture using React and Tailwind CSS.
His core tech stack includes **React**, **JavaScript (ES6+)**, **Tailwind CSS**, and **Vite**. He also has experience with Redux, TypeScript, and Java/Spring Boot from his internship.
Narayan is proficient in **TypeScript** for building scalable apps and specializes in **UI performance optimization** (lazy loading, code splitting, memoization) to ensure a smooth user experience.
Yes! Narayan is open to discussing interesting projects. You can reach out via the Contact section or email him at **narayanprasad2521@gmail.com** to discuss collaboration.
You can reach Narayan via email at **narayanprasad2521@gmail.com** or connect with him on LinkedIn at [linkedin.com/in/narayan-prasad-mohanty](https://www.linkedin.com/in/narayan-prasad-mohanty).
Narayan excels at writing clean, maintainable code and building high-performance UIs. He is a self-motivated learner, a strong team leader, and has a deep understanding of modern frontend ecosystems.
Narayan is based in **India** and is open to both remote roles and relocation for the right opportunity.

content.fallback: I'm sorry, I don't have information on that specifically yet. But I can tell you about my experience, tech stack, or how to contact me! Feel free to pick one of the suggestions below.

content.title: About Me
content.bio: I'm a frontend developer with over 2 years of experience crafting high-performance, scalable web applications using modern frameworks like React, Vite, and Tailwind CSS. My journey started with curiosity, turned into consistent coding, and now drives my passion for building meaningful digital experiences.
paragraphs: In my current role, I’ve built reusable component libraries, integrated APIs, debugged complex issues, and optimized UI performance across multiple client-facing projects. I'm especially strong in JavaScript and love finding the cleanest, most efficient solution to a problem.

I take pride in writing clean, maintainable code and staying up-to-date with best practices. Whether it's building a finance dashboard, a job automation tool, or a custom ROI calculator, I always aim for user-friendly interfaces and responsive designs.

Outside of coding, I’m self-motivated and constantly learning — right now I’m leveling up my skills to break into a higher package role. I’m not afraid to get my hands dirty, explore DevOps, or automate a few things if it helps the project scale.

contributions: Leading a team of 3 frontend developers to deliver high-quality UIs
Defined UI architecture and best practices for component development
Conducted code reviews, team mentoring, and sprint planning
Enhanced performance and accessibility of core interfaces
Worked cross-functionally with design and backend teams in Agile setup
Built and maintained core components using React and JavaScript
Translated Figma/UX designs into production-ready UI
Collaborated with senior engineers to improve code quality and performance
Learned and applied frontend fundamentals in real-world projects
Assisted in building internal tools using React and Tailwind CSS
Gained experience in version control (Git) and Agile methodologies
Completed hands-on training in Java Full Stack development
Built CRUD-based web applications using Java, Spring Boot, and MySQL
Designed responsive frontend interfaces using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
Integrated REST APIs and handled backend logic in Spring Boot
Gained experience in version control (Git) and Agile project workflows
